JavaScript Fundamentals Every Developer Should Know

JavaScript is the language of the web. Understanding its core concepts is crucial for any web developer.

Key Concepts

  1. Variables and data types
  2. Functions and scope
  3. Objects and arrays
  4. Asynchronous programming

These fundamentals will serve you throughout your development career.
